last_prompt: Research and design an API token cost-tracking and budget-control system for wreck-it. Review the agent execution flow in cli/src/agent.rs and cli/src/ralph_loop.rs to identify where token usage can be captured from LLM API responses (usage field in OpenAI-compatible responses). Design: (1) a CostTracker struct that accumulates prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, and estimated_cost_usd per task and for the whole run, (2) a new Config field `max_cost_usd: Option<f64>` that aborts the loop when the cumulative estimated cost exceeds the threshold, (3) a cost summary line printed at the end of each iteration in both headless and TUI modes, (4) per-model pricing constants for common GitHub Models / OpenAI models. Document the design as inline comments in a new cli/src/cost_tracker.rs stub file.
